empty.loadingBody: One moment while we fetch your plan.
empty.noneBody: Complete the interview and your roadmap will appear here.

emailCard.title: Don’t lose this roadmap
emailCard.body: We’ll email it to you — the link signs you in on any device, no password to invent. You’ll also get a short weekly roundup of what’s due while your move is underway.

banners.penaltyOne: 1 item carries a financial penalty if missed.
banners.penaltyMany: {{count}} items carry financial penalties if missed.
banners.consulate: US consulate wait times are currently 8–16 weeks. Book your appointment as early as possible.

toolbar.exportA11y: Export your roadmap as a PDF

week.clearWaiting: Your remaining steps are waiting on earlier milestones — the full roadmap has the whole picture.

sheet.addDate: did it earlier? add the date
sheet.dateHint: When did you actually do this? Downstream dates re-flow from it.
sheet.dateUnreadable: I can’t read that yet — try the month as a word, e.g. "25 April 2026".
sheet.changeLink: Something changed? Tell Lola to update your plan →
sheet.overdueNudge: This one's past due. Already handled it? Mark it done — even with the real date — and the plan re-flows around what actually happened. Plans changed? Tell Lola below.
sheet.regionalBody: The specifics of this step are set by each comunidad autónoma. The source link covers the national rules; your region's own rates and windows apply.
sheet.regionalBodyWithRegion: The specifics of this step are set by each comunidad autónoma — yours: {{region}}. The source link covers the national rules; your region's own rates and windows apply.

sample.title: This is {{name}}'s plan.
sample.body: {{name}} — {{blurb}}. Get Camino turned their situation into the {{count}}-step, deadline-aware roadmap below. Yours will look different: a few answers about your own move, and the same engine builds it just for you.
sample.ctaNote: Free · about 3 minutes · no account needed to start
sample.tease: In your own plan, Lola coaches you through this step, you check it off, and the dates re-flow around what actually happens.
sample.closingBody: Different passport, work, family, or plans — different roadmap. Tell Lola about your move and get the version that's actually yours, with real deadlines in the right order.

coach.error: Sorry — I couldn't load that just now. Try asking again in a moment.

hints.visa: e.g. I got a remote job, so we’re switching to the digital-nomad visa.
hints.residency: e.g. My residence card (TIE) was issued on 2027-02-01.
hints.tax: e.g. I’ll be freelancing in Spain after all, not just living off savings.
hints.health: e.g. We’re only staying six months, not moving permanently.
hints.mobility: e.g. We decided no one will drive in Spain.
hints.banking: e.g. Our arrival moved two months later.
hints.family: e.g. We got married last month.
hints.property: e.g. We decided to rent instead of buy.
hints.admin: e.g. We’re arriving in November instead of September.
hints.generic: e.g. Our arrival date moved to next spring.

changeNote.errBody: I couldn’t process that just now — please try again.
changeNote.noChangeBody: Nothing in your plan needed to change. If a step happened (or will happen) on a specific date, mark it done "on a date" and the plan re-flows from that.
changeNote.noopBody: I’ve saved that, and nothing in your plan needed to move because of it.
changeNote.remodelTitle: That was useful — I’ve remodelled your plan!
